data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a fast owner-centric index for API/UI.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement: 'Fast owner-centric index for API/UI'. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or reads that confirm this requirement. The prior steps focus on creating resources and booking offers, but do not address the specific requirement of validating the owner-centric index, indicating a gap in the evidence.
gaps: No evidence confirming the existence of a fast owner-centric index for API/UI.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
